metadata.significance: First of two protective surahs (Al-Mu'awwidhatain), seeks refuge from evil

ayahs.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ ٱلْفَلَقِ

translations.en_sahih: Say, "I seek refuge in the Lord of daybreak
translations.en_yusufali: Say: I seek refuge with the Lord of the Dawn
translations.ms_basmeih: Katakanlah (wahai Muhammad); "Aku berlindung kepada (Allah) Tuhan yang menciptakan sekalian makhluk,

translations.en_sahih: From the evil of that which He created
translations.en_yusufali: From the mischief of created things;

translations.en_sahih: And from the evil of darkness when it settles
translations.en_yusufali: From the mischief of Darkness as it overspreads;
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan dari bahaya gelap apabila ia masuk;

translations.en_sahih: And from the evil of the blowers in knots
translations.en_yusufali: From the mischief of those who practise secret arts;
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan dari kejahatan makhluk-makhluk yang menghembus-hembus pada simpulan-simpulan (dan ikatan-ikatan);

translations.en_sahih: And from the evil of an envier when he envies."
translations.en_yusufali: And from the mischief of the envious one as he practises envy.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan dari kejahatan orang yang dengki apabila ia melakukan dengkinya".
